comments.author: @elisetafao5248
comments.text: From American Samoa.  Tokelau was one of my bucket list of places to visit.  Thanks for sharing.

comments.author: @twilightpurpleglow
comments.text: Very interesting video. Narrator has a pleasant voice. Love how people respect each other and have meetings to discuss grievances. Men are very hardworking when out fishing, love they also have gardens to grow veggies. There should be groups organizing events for the youths music/dancing/football other sports and learn computers. Alcohol/cigarettes should be banned. Incredible the use of solar power. A place where sharks are respected left to live peacefully in their own environment. I pray people in the three islands will never loose respect for each other and peace will rule the land for many more centuries. Texas USA
